import React from "react"; import "./Dashboard.css"; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { if (!dashboardData || !dashboardData.individualResult) { return (

No Analysis Results Available

Please run a customer analysis first from the Individual Analysis section.

); } const { individualResult, customerData, timestamp } = dashboardData; const { probability, prediction, business_impact, feature_importance, recommendations, risk_level, top_driver, current_profile } = individualResult; // Calculate risk score and progress bar width const riskScore = Math.round(probability * 100); const riskProgressWidth = `${riskScore}%`; // Get risk color based on probability const getRiskColor = (prob) => { if (prob < 0.3) return "#10b981"; // Green if (prob < 0.7) return "#f59e0b"; // Amber return "#ef4444"; // Red }; const riskColor = getRiskColor(probability); // Format currency const formatCurrency = (amount) => { return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', maximumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(amount); }; return (
{/* Header Section */}

Customer Churn Analysis

Analysis completed: {timestamp}

{riskScore}%
{risk_level.toUpperCase()} RISK
{/* Main Metrics Grid */}
🎯
{riskScore}%
Churn Probability
{prediction === 1 ? "High churn risk" : "Low churn risk"}
💰
{formatCurrency(business_impact.estimated_clv)}
Customer Lifetime Value
Potential revenue at risk
📉
{formatCurrency(business_impact.potential_revenue_loss)}
Potential Loss
Based on churn probability
🛡️
{formatCurrency(business_impact.retention_budget)}
Retention Budget
Recommended investment
{/* Left Column */}
{/* Risk Assessment */}

Risk Assessment

Low (0-30%) Medium (31-70%) High (71-100%)
Primary Risk Driver: {top_driver}
Prediction Confidence: {Math.round(probability * 100)}%
{/* Feature Importance */}

Top Contributing Factors

{feature_importance.slice(0, 6).map((feature, index) => (
{feature.Feature} {Math.round(feature.Contribution * 100)}%
{feature.Type}
))}
{/* Right Column */}
{/* Customer Profile Summary */}

Customer Profile Summary

Tenure {current_profile['Tenure (Months)']} months
Total Orders {current_profile['Total Orders']}
Satisfaction {current_profile['Satisfaction Score']}/5
Last Order {current_profile['Days Since Last Order']} days ago
Cashback {formatCurrency(current_profile['Cashback Amount (₹)'])}
Complaint Filed {current_profile.Complain ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
{/* Action Recommendations */}

Recommended Actions

{recommendations.map((rec, index) => (
{index + 1}
{rec}
))}
{/* Business Impact */}

Business Impact Analysis

+{formatCurrency(business_impact.estimated_clv - business_impact.potential_revenue_loss)}
Potential Retention Value
{business_impact.roi_retention > 0 ? '+' : ''}{Math.round(business_impact.roi_retention * 100)}%
ROI on Retention
💡 Insight: {risk_level === 'high' ? 'Immediate action required to prevent customer churn' : risk_level === 'medium' ? 'Proactive measures recommended to maintain loyalty' : 'Focus on retention and upselling opportunities'}
{/* Quick Stats Bar */}
{customerData.NumberOfDeviceRegistered || 0}
Devices
{customerData.NumberOfAddress || 0}
Addresses
{customerData.CouponUsed || 0}
Coupons Used
{customerData.CityTier || 1}
City Tier
{customerData.HourSpendOnApp || 0}h
App Usage
); } export default BatchDashboard;
